Flow.label: Screenflow - Patient Agreements - Creation

screens.name: PA_Creation_Screen_Account_Record_Type
screens.label: PA Creation Screen Account Record Type

value.stringValue: [{"label":"Return To Account","value":"Return To Account","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":0},{"label":"Create Another Patient Agreement","value":"Create Another Patient Agreement","iconPosition":"left","variant":"neutral","index":1}]

screens.name: PA_Creation_Screen_Opportunity_Record_Type
screens.label: PA Creation Screen Opportunity Record Type

value.stringValue: [{"label":"Return To Opportunity","value":"Return To Opportunity","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":0},{"label":"Create Another Patient Agreement","value":"Create Another Patient Agreement","iconPosition":"left","variant":"neutral","index":1}]

screens.name: PA_Not_Created_Account_Record_Type
screens.label: PA Not Created Account Record Type

value.stringValue: [{"label":"Return To Account","value":"Return To Account","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":0},{"label":"Create New Patient Agreement","value":"Create New Patient Agreement","iconPosition":"left","variant":"neutral","index":1}]

screens.name: PA_Not_Created_Opportunity_Record_Type
screens.label: PA Not Created Opportunity Record Type

value.stringValue: [{"label":"Return To Opportunity","value":"Return To Opportunity","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":0},{"label":"Create New Patient Agreement","value":"Create New Patient Agreement","iconPosition":"left","variant":"neutral","index":1}]

fields.name: I_already_uploaded_the_file_to_the_EHR
fields.fieldText: I already uploaded the Signed PDF to the EHR

screens.name: Tags_To_Show_Account_Record_Type
screens.label: Tags To Show Account Record Type

fields.name: Text_To_Show_EHR_Tags_Account
fields.fieldText: Patient Agreement created. The document that you have uploaded is expected to have the following tags. Please ensure these tags are on the EHR Document:

value.stringValue: [{"label":"Return To Account","value":"Return To Account","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":0},{"label":"Create Another Patient Agreement","value":"Create Another Patient Agreement","iconPosition":"left","variant":"neutral","index":1}]

screens.name: Tags_To_Show_Opportunity_Record_Type
screens.label: Tags To Show Opportunity Record Type

fields.name: Display_Text_Opportunity_EHR
fields.fieldText: Patient Agreement created. The document that you have uploaded is expected to have the following tags. Please ensure these tags are on the EHR Document:

value.stringValue: [{"label":"Return To Opportunity","value":"Return To Opportunity","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","index":0},{"label":"Create Another Patient Agreement","value":"Create Another Patient Agreement","iconPosition":"left","variant":"neutral","index":1}]

variables.description: Can be used to determine if the starting record is an Account or the Opportunity to help auto fill details below.
variables.name: recordId
